subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, verily you are the Helper of the heavens and the earth and whatsoever lies between them. You give aid to whom you will and take aid from whom you will
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم انک انت نصار السموات و الارض و ما بینهما لتؤتین النصر من تشاء و لینزعن النصر عمن یشاء
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
